title: Clean Dark GUI
description: Clean, Modern, Dark and Simple GUI.
body:
# ![Clean Dark GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a5525ccbc8b6979f2861d71d88ef8efc7169be30.png)

This Texture Pack Changes most of the GUI Textures.

- White GUI Texts
- Container Textures
- No Heart Blinking
- Hotbar Textures
- Pack Loading Screen
- Some more...

Use Optifine for the Best Experience.

Join my [Discord](https://discord.gg/4GKytn9RRb).
